login.title: Sign In
login.description: Enter your credentials to access your account

register.title: Create Account
register.description: Sign up for a new account
register.passwordHint: Min 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, and number

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgotPassword.successDescription: If an account with that email exists, we've sent a password reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: The link will expire in 1 hour. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.passwordHint: Min 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, and number
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now sign in with your new password.

checkEmail.title: Check Your Email
checkEmail.description: We sent a verification link to {{email}}
checkEmail.message: Click the link in the email to verify your account. If you don't see the email, check your spam folder or request a new one.

verify.successMessage: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in.
